items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/mermaid-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!

items.content_html: Obsidian Cloud Storage is a powerful and user-friendly plugin designed to seamlessly integrate cloud storage capabilities into your Obsidian workflow. This plugin allows you to effortlessly upload your attachments to the cloud, freeing up local storage space and enabling easy sharing and access across all your devices.
items.title: yingjialong/obsidian-CloudStorage: Obsidian Cloud Storage is a powerful and user-friendly plugin designed to seamlessly integrate cloud storage capabilities into your Obsidian workflow. This plugin allows you to effortlessly upload your attachments to the cloud, freeing up local storage space and enabling easy sharing and access across all your devices.

items.content_html: GitHub template repository The repository for the sample plugin is a GitHub template repository, which means you can create your own repository from the sample plugin. To learn how, refer to Creating a repository from a template. Remember to use the URL of your own repository when cloning the sample plugin.
items.title: davidtkeane/obsidian-sample-plugin: GitHub template repository The repository for the sample plugin is a GitHub template repository, which means you can create your own repository from the sample plugin. To learn how, refer to Creating a repository from a template.  Remember to use the URL of your own repository when cloning the sample plugin.

items.content_html: Obsidian Super Minimal Setup is a streamlined, easy-to-use template for Obsidian, featuring a clean theme, essential plugins, and custom CSS snippets. Boost productivity with automated notes, image uploads, and GitHub backups—all in a distraction-free environment. Perfect for minimalists seeking efficient note-taking.

Boost productivity with automated notes, image uploads, and GitHub backups—all in a distraction-free environment. Perfect for minimalists seeking efficient note-taking.

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
